description: Extract 16 critical fields from Small Business Loan Applications for impactful demo showcasing complete business credit underwriting automation

businessName.description: Legal business name for loan approval and documentation
businessName.demo_impact: Verification against business registration and credit reporting

ein.demo_impact: Links loan to specific business entity and prevents fraud

businessType.description: Legal structure (LLC, Corporation, Partnership, Sole Proprietorship)
businessType.demo_impact: Determines tax treatment, liability, and underwriting guidelines

dateEstablished.description: Date business was established (must be 24+ months for most SBA programs)
dateEstablished.demo_impact: Eligibility check - newer businesses have higher risk

loanAmountRequested.description: Amount of loan requested in USD
loanAmountRequested.demo_impact: Primary decision factor - determines program eligibility and collateral requirements

loanPurpose.description: Purpose of loan (Working Capital, Equipment, Real Estate, Acquisition, etc.)
loanPurpose.demo_impact: Validates use of proceeds and determines loan terms

annualRevenue.description: Current annual gross revenue in USD
annualRevenue.demo_impact: Primary income metric for debt service capacity assessment

netIncome.description: Annual net income/profit after all expenses in USD
netIncome.demo_impact: Profitability indicator - must be positive for most approval

ebitda.description: EBITDA - Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, Amortization
ebitda.demo_impact: Core metric for Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) calculation

totalMonthlyDebtService.description: Total monthly debt service including existing loans and proposed new loan
totalMonthlyDebtService.demo_impact: Critical for DSCR calculation - determines repayment capacity

totalAssets.demo_impact: Balance sheet health and asset base for collateral

totalLiabilities.description: Total business liabilities and debt obligations

cashOnHand.description: Cash and cash equivalents available in business accounts
cashOnHand.demo_impact: Working capital health and emergency reserves

primaryOwnerName.description: Primary business owner/guarantor full legal name
primaryOwnerName.demo_impact: Personal guarantee requirement for most business loans

primaryOwnerCreditScore.description: Owner's personal FICO credit score (minimum 650 typically required)
primaryOwnerCreditScore.demo_impact: Personal credit assessment - primary risk indicator alongside business

collateralValue.description: Total estimated fair market value of collateral offered (Real Estate, Equipment, Receivables)
collateralValue.demo_impact: Collateral coverage for loan repayment - risk mitigation
